title: Marbling coloured slip on clay
notes: Two-colour slip marbling on a wet clay slab. Apply a base slip coat, then dot or trail a contrasting slip, and drag with a needle tool or comb to create marble patterns. Works on tiles and flat slabs. Uses coloured slips from the master table. The technique applies at the leather-hard stage for the base coat, then decorative slips are applied while the base is still tacky.
